title: cathartolinum schiedeanum
intro: Cathartolinum schiedeanum is a plant species, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, characterized by its prickly stems and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Cathartolinum schiedeanum include its ability to act as a purgative and to stimulate bowel movements, making it useful in treating constipation and other digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its use in treating fever and inflammation. Traditionally, Cathartolinum schiedeanum is prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to be consumed orally for its medicinal properties.
